name: martens-songs
description: Bilingual karaoke Bible-song site: English lyrics light up word by word, ES/DE translation underneath, painted backgrounds, idea-behind-the-song panel. Static site + Node build scripts.
comment: No npm dependencies on purpose (only Node built-ins + global fetch, needs Node >=18). External tools and APIs (image generator, OpenAI/Whisper, ElevenLabs, Gemini) live outside this repo by design, see BRANDING.md. Per-song commands take an id, e.g. `npm run verify -- the-sower` or `node tools/build-anim.js the-sower`.
